app.name: Mood of the Major
app.footer: Anonymous emotional sharing for university communities.

landing.headline: Share how you feel — anonymously, safely, together.
landing.description: Mood of the Major helps students express emotional experience without revealing identity, while communities understand collective mood across faculties and majors.

anonymous.title: Anonymous posts
anonymous.body: Your voice matters. Your identity stays private in public views.

feeds.title: Faculty & major feeds
feeds.body: See how your academic community is feeling over time.

trust.title: Built for trust
trust.body: Security, moderation, and privacy are core — not add-ons.

landing.authLiveBody: Create an account to access your feed — browse anonymous moods or share your own.
